test.query: SELECT count() FROM numbers_mt(50000000) WHERE (toUInt16(number), toUInt16(intHash32(number))) IN (SELECT toUInt16(number), toUInt16(intHash32(number)) FROM numbers(1000000))
SELECT count() FROM numbers_mt(50000000) WHERE (toUInt32(number), toUInt32(intHash64(number))) IN (SELECT toUInt32(number), toUInt32(intHash64(number)) FROM numbers(1000000))
